bead.title: Specify snapshot-first autorouting and freshness ownership
bead.description:
Amend the routing and snapshot governing docs so implementation is not relying on chat context.

Required design contract:
- Autorouting decision = route(client_inputs, fiz_models_snapshot).
- Client inputs include policy/profile, pins, no_remote, metered opt-in, tools/context/reasoning needs, and other explicit constraints.
- The fiz models snapshot is the only source of routing facts: health, quota, model availability, effective cost, actual_cash_spend, billing kind, context/tools/reasoning support, locality, reliability, latency, utilization, and per-field freshness.
- Server/refresh coordinator owns background freshness and refresh coalescing. fiz models must not spawn independent probe storms.
- fiz models is quick; fiz models --refresh blocks on routing-relevant stale fields; fiz models --refresh-all blocks on all refreshable fields. Without a running server, stale output suggests starting the server or using --refresh.
- Hard gates are limited to explicit user constraints and dispatchability. Cost, quality, health risk, latency, utilization, and power fit are scoring inputs.
- Subscription models use PAYG-equivalent effective/shadow cost for scoring while retaining actual_cash_spend=false. Pay-per-token providers are gated only when dispatch creates actual metered spend and the user has not opted in.

In scope: docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-004-model-routing.md, docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-011-cost-based-routing-with-quota-pools.md, docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-003-fizeau-service.md, docs/routing/*.md, ADR-012 snapshot/cache docs if present.

Out of scope: implementation code; create follow-up beads instead of partially implementing.
bead.acceptance:
1. rg -n 'route\(client_inputs, fiz_models_snapshot\)|actual_cash_spend|effective_cost|PAYG-equivalent|refresh-all|server.*fresh|hard gates' docs/helix docs/routing returns matches in the amended routing/snapshot docs.
2. rg -n 'subscription.*free|zero-cost subscription|frontier_excluded_by_cheap_policy' docs/helix docs/routing returns no matches.
3. ddx doc stale exits 0 or reports only pre-existing unrelated stale documents.
4. lefthook run pre-commit --all-files passes.
